tieBreakingRule.text: In the event that two (or more) teams have an equal number of points, the following rules break the tie: 1. Head-to-Head (points, goal difference) 2. Goal difference 3. Goals scored Championship and Relegation round: half points will be used as tie breaker for teams that were rounded down after the regular season
